## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on AI-led growth newsletter, social media performance, and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/DdzzuX86Ukv9YLdAr5S4aym_EE5txfsz?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Newsletter needs refinement: improve writing style, add visuals, enhance summaries](https://fathom.video/share/DdzzuX86Ukv9YLdAr5S4aym_EE5txfsz?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Social media performing well: YouTube (900-1000 views/video), TikTok (765+ views/day)](https://fathom.video/share/DdzzuX86Ukv9YLdAr5S4aym_EE5txfsz?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [SEO opportunity: Create targeted shorts/clips to boost organic search traffic](https://fathom.video/share/DdzzuX86Ukv9YLdAr5S4aym_EE5txfsz?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Process improvements: Pre-meeting agenda sharing, tracking content iterations](https://fathom.video/share/DdzzuX86Ukv9YLdAr5S4aym_EE5txfsz?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)

## Topics

### Newsletter Refinement

  - [Current draft needs work on language, structure, and visual elements](https://fathom.video/share/DdzzuX86Ukv9YLdAr5S4aym_EE5txfsz?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Jason provided detailed feedback on writing style and content presentation](https://fathom.video/share/DdzzuX86Ukv9YLdAr5S4aym_EE5txfsz?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Aim for a dense yet warming, casual writing style with moderate shorthand](https://fathom.video/share/DdzzuX86Ukv9YLdAr5S4aym_EE5txfsz?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Add value beyond summarization: incorporate experience, relevance to readers](https://fathom.video/share/DdzzuX86Ukv9YLdAr5S4aym_EE5txfsz?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Create infographics for key concepts (e.g., workshop anatomy, community breakdown)](https://fathom.video/share/DdzzuX86Ukv9YLdAr5S4aym_EE5txfsz?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)

### Social Media Performance

  - [YouTube: Averaging 900-1000 views per video without paid promotion](https://fathom.video/share/DdzzuX86Ukv9YLdAr5S4aym_EE5txfsz?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [TikTok: Recent video reached 765 views in one day](https://fathom.video/share/DdzzuX86Ukv9YLdAr5S4aym_EE5txfsz?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Strong engagement metrics across platforms (e.g., 85% likes on YouTube shorts)](https://fathom.video/share/DdzzuX86Ukv9YLdAr5S4aym_EE5txfsz?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [TikTok login issues resolved; account now accessible to Rafid](https://fathom.video/share/DdzzuX86Ukv9YLdAr5S4aym_EE5txfsz?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Explore "posting same content daily" tactic for potential virality](https://fathom.video/share/DdzzuX86Ukv9YLdAr5S4aym_EE5txfsz?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [Focus on creating SEO-driven cutdowns from existing content (e.g., workshop clips)](https://fathom.video/share/DdzzuX86Ukv9YLdAr5S4aym_EE5txfsz?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Use tools like Ahrefs to identify high-potential search topics for shorts/clips](https://fathom.video/share/DdzzuX86Ukv9YLdAr5S4aym_EE5txfsz?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [Aim to increase organic search traffic by tailoring content to search intent](https://fathom.video/share/DdzzuX86Ukv9YLdAr5S4aym_EE5txfsz?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)

### Process Improvements

  - [Collaborate on creating artifacts and workflows for structured content creation](https://fathom.video/share/DdzzuX86Ukv9YLdAr5S4aym_EE5txfsz?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
